name: String to Integer (atoi)
description: Implement the myAtoi(string s) function, which converts a string to a 32-bit signed integer. The algorithm: 1) Read and ignore leading whitespace. 2) Check if the next character is '-' or '+' (optional sign). 3) Read digits until a non-digit character or end of input. 4) Convert digits to integer. 5) Clamp the result to the 32-bit signed integer range [-2^31, 2^31 - 1].
constraints: 0 <= s.length <= 200. s consists of English letters, digits, ' ', '+', '-', and '.'.

performance.stress_intent: exercise trimming, sign parsing, early stop, and int32 clamping; strict local separation is deferred
